epics.title: Register a full-track audio draft in the songs library

tasks.title: Add Die With a Smile to the static songs library
acceptance_criteria: The songs library includes a new Die With a Smile entry.
The entry exposes title, artist, key, meter, chart notes, and sectioned systems.
The registration clearly flags provisional bars that came from audio-only inference.
done_definition: The new song entry is readable by the existing songs workspace without schema changes.

assumptions: A static registration in src/lib/songs.ts is the intended songs-library source of truth.
The current full-track MIR cache is accurate enough for a provisional chart registration.
risks: Audio-only bars with chromatic labels may still need symbolic correction later.
The full-track meter remains less certain than the overall key center.
